name: Salade De Laitue Aux Noix
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Apple, peeled, cored and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the lettuce in a bowl with the sprouts.
2. Add sliced apples, tomatoes, and olives to the bowl.
3. Mash the anchovies with salt until a paste forms.
4. Heat a skillet over high heat and add the anchovy paste.
5. Stir for 30 seconds and transfer the mixture to a warm bowl.
6. Add minced garlic, Dijon mustard, salt, pepper, and vinegar.
7. Mix well to blend all ingredients.
8. Gradually add parsley, stirring continuously.
9. Slowly drizzle in oil while mixing until a smooth sauce forms.
10. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat.
